release_notes:
## Fixes
- Fixed the update progress bar rendering grey instead of gold
- Updater now downloads whatever files are actually listed in the release manifest, so the bug report icon, thinking animation, and AME presets stay in sync automatically instead of relying on a fixed list baked into the app

## Functionality
- Added automatic update checking (hourly in the background, plus a manual check from the Finishing Tool menu)
- Render preset matching is now more flexible about naming, so a slightly different preset name still gets picked up
- Added a Render Preset picker next to Export that remembers your last choice
- Added "Rescan Episodes" after a scan, so new timeline markers can be picked up without starting over

## Interface
- Polished rounded corners across the tab panels
- Redesigned the update notification with rounded corners, padding, and its own Release Notes button
- Added Preferences, About, an Edit menu, and an expanded Help menu (Release Notes, GitHub link, support folder)
- Release Notes now open in their own formatted window instead of one dense paragraph
